action.reasoning: Observation: Best mean_r2=0.5229 with ptend_q=0.3217 as main bottleneck. The model (1024/8, 35 epochs) was still improving. Analysis: Two key improvements: (1) Feature-weighted loss with zero weight on near-zero-variance features (don't waste capacity on unpredictable features) and 1.5x weight on non-masked ptend_q features (direct capacity to bottleneck). (2) AMP for faster training, allowing 50 epochs in ~35 minutes. Previous q_weight=2.0 failed because it weighted ALL ptend_q including unpredictable ones; zeroing out masked features should fix this. Decision: Retrain with feature-weighted loss and AMP, 50 epochs, then fix_mask and submit eval.
